task_description: Create mission.html page for MiSmart Insurance Solution Syariah (MiSSION Syariah) product at public/pages/mission.html. The page must use question-based language, include premium tables, an error-free calculator using lookup method, and follow the existing design system.

verification.summary: File created (951 lines). 2 inline scripts pass JS syntax validation. 28 keyword class usages found. All 4 structural elements present. UX review fixes applied: loyalty bonus labels clarified, COI card moved outside dynamic results, monthly multiplier note added.
